title: log_queries_not_using_indexes does nothing for full index scan
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c1 INT, c2 CHAR(255), c3 VARCHAR(1000), c4 DATE, PRIMARY KEY(c1, c2), INDEX idx_c2(c2));
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES(1, 'test1', 'data1', DATE '2023-01-01'), (2, 'test2', 'data2', DATE '2023-01-02'), (3, NULL, 'data3', DATE '2023-01-03');
SELECT c1 FROM t2 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: log_queries_not_using_indexes does not log full index scans
